title: Log Rotation Basics
description: Configure logrotate for a noisy application log so rotated files compress and old archives are pruned. Download this lab from the catalog — it is not included in the desktop installer.
tasks: Inspect the sample application log under /var/log/demo-app
Create a logrotate stanza for that log
Trigger a rotation and confirm compressed archives appear
Verify only the configured number of rotations are kept

objectivesPublic.label: Write logrotate configuration
objectivesPublic.text: Add a logrotate config that rotates the demo application log daily with compression.
objectivesPublic.hint: Place a file under /etc/logrotate.d/ — include rotate, compress, and the log path from the briefing.

objectivesPublic.label: Run a manual rotation
objectivesPublic.text: Force logrotate to run once and confirm a rotated file exists.
objectivesPublic.hint: Use logrotate with the force flag against your stanza, then list the log directory.
